name: Marco Rubio
subject: Peter, I need to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Reclaim America PAC
body:
Peter,

With your hard work we were able to take back
the Senate last November, but that was just the first step. Now,
we have to deliver. We have to focus on real solutions for
restoring the American Dream.

Please fill out this quick survey and let me
know what you believe are the top issues and what Reclaim America
should be focusing on first?

www.reclaimamericapac.com/petitionid-01315b/?utm_source=rap&utm_medium=email&utm_content=text

Remember, taking back the Senate was just the
first step. Now, it's time to put America back on the right
track.

Will you please let me know what you believe
are the keys to Reclaim America?

www.reclaimamericapac.com/petitionid-01315b/?utm_source=rap&utm_medium=email&utm_content=text

Proud to Stand,

Marco

Paid for by Reclaim America PAC.
Not Authorized by any candidate or
candidate's committee.
228 S. Washington Street Suite 115
Alexandria, VA 22314

www.reclaimamericapac.com

Contributions to Reclaim America PAC are not
deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax
purposes.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system March 28, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW6hCoQ10N

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Rick
subject: Thanks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
| | ****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjIzODcyNzES1&r=MTA2MDkwMjE4MDYyS0&b=0&j=NTQwMzk1NDgxS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwMzkzMzMwS0&rt=0) Peter - Thank you for taking part by signing our petition.

Thousands of Americans like you have responded. The mark of a healthy democracy is an engaged citizenry. With the overwhelming response we have received it is clear that the American Democracy is strong. And you are to credit for that!

You can receive updates from us on Facebook and Twitter. Please [like our page](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIzODcyNzES1&r=MTA2MDkwMjE4MDYyS0&b=0&j=NTQwMzk1NDgxS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwMzkzMzMwS0&rt=0) and [follow us](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjIzODcyNzES1&r=MTA2MDkwMjE4MDYyS0&b=0&j=NTQwMzk1NDgxS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwMzkzMzMwS0&rt=0) today. And please tell your friends.

Thanks again,

Rick Wiley
Our American Revival
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzODcyNzES1&r=MTA2MDkwMjE4MDYyS0&b=0&j=NTQwMzk1NDgxS0&mt=2&rj=NTQwMzkzMzMwS0&rt=0)
